name: Data Sentinel
description: Deep second-pass scan for sensitive data that slipped through initial PII scrubbing. Detects JWT tokens, API keys, private keys, connection strings, internal IPs/hostnames, medical records, crypto wallets, encoded blobs, and more. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).

authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: scan_leaks
tools.description: Deep second-pass scan for sensitive data that may have slipped through initial PII scrubbing. Detects JWT tokens, API keys, private keys, connection strings, internal IPs, medical records, crypto wallets, encoded secrets, and more.

text.description: The text to scan for leaked sensitive data

clean.description: True if no sensitive data was found

type.description: Category of leak (jwt_token, aws_key, internal_ip, etc.)

match.description: Masked version of the matched sensitive data

context.description: Surrounding text for locating the leak

leaks.description: Individual leak signals with masked matches
